title: Persist resolved procedure run parameters in task metadata
description:
## Problem
ProcedureTask shows blank parameter values because run-time parameter values are not persisted with the task/procedure run record.

## Behavior Spec
Feature: Procedure run parameter persistence
Scenario: Dispatch a procedure run with parameter overrides
Given a procedure run is started
When the task and procedure dispatch metadata are written
Then resolved run parameters are stored with the run metadata
And ProcedureTask can read and display those values in the UI.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented persistence + display fix for procedure run parameters. Backend now writes resolved run_parameters/run_options into task metadata at run dispatch (including YAML defaults/value fields + CLI/context overrides). Frontend ProcedureTask now merges YAML defaults/values with task.metadata.run_parameters, and task creation paths (continue/branch/template create) include run_parameters in metadata. Tests passed: dashboard ProcedureTask.optimizer-auth and pytest plexus/cli/shared/test_experiment_runner.py.
